decisions.title: Use Session State For Short-Horizon Planning
decisions.description: The todo list in this chapter is intentionally lightweight. It helps the model keep one active thread of work without pretending to be the project-wide source of truth.
decisions.alternatives: Jumping straight to persistent tasks would hide the useful distinction between an ephemeral checklist and a durable task runtime.

zh.title: 用会话状态承载短周期规划
zh.description: 这里的 todo 刻意保持轻量，只用于帮助模型维持当前工作线程，而不是冒充项目级事实来源。

ja.title: 短期計画にはセッション状態を使う
ja.description: この章の todo は意図的に軽量で、現在の作業線を保つためのものであり、プロジェクト全体の真実の源を名乗らせません。

decisions.title: Allow Only One In-Progress Item
decisions.description: A single active item forces the model to expose what it is doing right now. This avoids pseudo-multitasking, where several half-progressed items accumulate and state gets muddled.
decisions.alternatives: Multiple active items look flexible, but in practice they make the plan less legible and the execution less reliable.

zh.title: 同一时刻只允许一个进行中项目
zh.description: 只允许一个活动项，可以强制模型明确暴露“现在正在做什么”，避免伪多任务带来的状态混乱。

ja.title: 同時に進行中は一項目だけ
ja.description: 進行中を一つに制限することで、モデルが今何をしているかを明示させ、擬似的なマルチタスクによる状態の混乱を避けます。
